creator: skv@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

1. This patch  is made against "blead" perl - no "maint-5.8" 
Did you really test this patch on perl-5.8? 
I can only include it into the upcoming lang/perl5.10 

2. There are no tests for described case. 

3. This issue only applied when option THREADS is "on" and  
option PERL_MALLOC is "off" (both are not in their default 
values).
